Class Element

java.lang.Object
org.jscience.natural.chemistry.Element
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, Commented, ComprehensiveIdentification, Identified<Identification>, Named
Direct Known Subclasses:
Halogen, Metal, NobleGas, NonMetal
public class Element extends Object implements ComprehensiveIdentification
A chemical element. Modernized to use JScience V5 Quantity system and Identification system. Implements ComprehensiveIdentification to support dynamic traits and consistent identity.
Since:
1.0
Author:
Silvere Martin-Michiellot, Gemini AI (Google DeepMind)
See Also:
